mapper.select: SELECT `t1`.`room_id` FROM `petlog`.`chat_room_member` `t1` JOIN `petlog`.`chat_room_member` `t2` ON `t1`.`room_id` = `t2`.`room_id` WHERE `t1`.`user_id` = #{userId} AND `t2`.`user_id` = #{targetUserId} LIMIT 1

SELECT `t2`.`id` AS `userId`, `t3`.`nickname` AS `nickname`, `t4`.`image_url` AS `profileImageUrl`, `t1`.`created_at` AS `followedAt` FROM `petlog`.`follows` AS `t1` JOIN `petlog`.`users` AS `t2` ON `t1`.`followed_user_id` = `t2`.`id` JOIN `petlog`.`personal_user` AS `t3` ON `t3`.`user_id` = `t2`.`id` LEFT JOIN `petlog`.`pets` AS `t4` ON `t4`.`user_id` = `t2`.`id` AND `t4`.`is_primary` = 1 WHERE `t1`.`following_user_id` = #{userId} ORDER BY
t1.created_at DESC
t3.nickname ASC

SELECT `id` AS `messageId`, `room_id` AS `roomId`, `sender_id` AS `senderId`, `message` AS `message`, `created_at` AS `createdAt` FROM `petlog`.`chat_message` WHERE `room_id` = #{roomId} ORDER BY `id`
SELECT `room_id` AS `roomId`, `sender_id` AS `senderId`, `message` AS `message`, `created_at` AS `createdAt` FROM `petlog`.`chat_message` WHERE `id` = #{messageId}

SELECT `t1`.`id` AS `roomId`, `t4`.`nickname` AS `nickname`, `t1`.`last_message` AS `lastMessage`, `t1`.`last_sender_id` AS `lastSenderId`, `t1`.`last_message_at` AS `lastMessageAt`, COUNT(`t5`.`id`) AS `unReadCount` FROM `petlog`.`chat_room` `t1` JOIN `petlog`.`chat_room_member` `t2` ON `t2`.`room_id` = `t1`.`id` AND `t2`.`user_id` = #{userId} JOIN `petlog`.`chat_room_member` `t3` ON `t3`.`room_id` = `t1`.`id` AND `t3`.`user_id` != #{userId} JOIN `petlog`.`personal_user` `t4` ON `t4`.`user_id` = `t3`.`user_id` LEFT JOIN `chat_message` `t5` ON `t5`.`room_id` = `t1`.`id` AND `t5`.`id` > IFNULL(`t2`.`last_read_message_id`, 0) AND `t5`.`sender_id` != #{userId} GROUP BY `t1`.`id`, `t4`.`nickname`, `t1`.`last_message`, `t1`.`last_sender_id`, `t1`.`last_message_at`
ORDER BY `t1`.last_message_at DESC
